rows.source_ref: ForexFactory thread "How you place your stop loss?", started by yyc196, ForexFactory forum, undated, https://www.forexfactory.com/thread/148885 (30 posts)
rows.concept: A stop-loss placement / money-management opinion thread with no complete deterministic entry+exit strategy defined by any contributor.
rows.eligibility_reason: Discussion of stop-loss philosophy and money management only; no post specifies a full deterministic entry+exit system, so nothing is implementable as a strategy.
rows.notes: Notable fragments: (1) ixbone runs a manual martingale (add to losers, doubling lots, SL removed on final legs) on vague indicator entries -> incompatible with FTMO/DXZ DD limits, REJECTED as martingale/stops-optional. (2) mikkom: 'daily breakout methods' with 2-day-ATR initial stop + Donchian/last-week's-low trail -> the only edge-adjacent idea, but entry is entirely undefined (fails deterministic-entry rule). (3) TJPLD: EUR/USD H4, 50-70 pip stop behind S/R, no TP, move to BE at +50 pips -> exit/stop management only, no entry rule. (4) Dr.Geppynius/Xaron/gspajon/birdt: 1% risk, stop-defines-size, anti-martingale sizing, structure trailing -> MM/exit heuristics, no entries. Thread yields zero usable candidate strategies.

notes: single REJECTED summary row: stop-loss/money-management discussion thread with no complete mechanical strategy
